name: combo_indicator_search
public_artifact_policy: sanitized only; raw OHLCV and result metrics stay in private aegis-strategies/incubating/olympus45
thesis: Predeclared technical indicator combinations should beat buy-and-hold only if they survive locked OOS, full costs, and multiple-testing correction.
